title: Weekly Budget Tracker
description: Set simple spending limits for gas, groceries, dining, shopping, and more, with automatic updates as you log purchases.

title: Retirement Planning
description: Set long-term savings goals and monitor projected growth toward financial independence.

title: Savings Goals
description: Create savings buckets—like Roth IRA, emergency fund, or vacation—and watch your progress grow with clean, easy-to-read visuals.

title: Debt Payoff
description: Track balances, payment progress, and estimated payoff dates to stay motivated and see how each week gets you closer to financial freedom.
